steps.title: Identify the contradiction
steps.content: The key signal is “differs significantly from the standard model's prediction” — a direct contradiction that would damage or weaken the theory's standing.

steps.title: Find what contradictions do to theories
steps.content:
Undermine means to weaken credibility or foundation—exactly what a contradictory measurement does to a theory.

The other choices either reverse the logic (satisfy = fulfill), miss the point (simplify = make easier), or misname the effect (overtake = be superseded).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
